description: You are logged into 2N Access Commander at https://localhost:9443 as admin (password: 2n). An automated alert has flagged an unauthorized email domain in the access control system. Locate the user account associated with the email domain '@external-vendor.net'. Save their assigned RFID card number to /home/ga/compromised_card.txt. Revoke their physical access by removing the RFID card credential from their profile and change their 'Company' field to 'Quarantined'. Save the modifications without deleting the user account.
